So that kind of allows us to really control what the article is going to be about.

Once we kind of get this dialed in, we move to the research step and the research step takes like all of the information from the assignment brief and then runs a search, I think in perplexity to ensure that it has enough information to generate a piece of content on that topic.

Once the research step is done, then we proceed with the outline, and this is where we do a ton of manual editing, we control the word count for each section, like the points that are going to appear in each

H2, H3, the structure, and we do that for every single section that appears here, so we're not hitting play on all of these different workflows, and usually here is when we can add additional, if you have, for example, I don't know, a specific quote that you want to use, a specific case study that you want to mention, we can also add it in here as well, as part of like the human review.

And that might be unnecessary or too long.

We have like a, we can use the inspect tool to see like what are the exact sections that it flags for review.
And if it doesn't, if it isn't confident in the output, it's either going to rephrase or remove a specific sentence or a paragraph.
And then the last step are the internal links.

We just want to make sure that like this piece of content.
It gets indexed quickly, and that it's also connected to other content on your site.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Metronome's white paper launch strategy and content generation process with growthx.ai team.](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [White paper launch strategy approved; week 1 tentatively set for next week](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Content generation artifacts crucial for quality; reviews needed on outlines and drafts](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Social media strategy to focus on key team members' posts for each anchor piece](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [Webflow landing page and HubSpot form needed for white paper early access](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)

## Topics

### White Paper Launch Strategy

  - [Four-week strategy approved, focusing on building momentum](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Week 1 tentatively set for next week, pending internal resource alignment](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [One anchor piece per week to be thoroughly reviewed and promoted](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Need to focus on amplification due to low organic blog traffic](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Build vs. Buy topic to be replaced with content on complexity/urgency](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)

### Content Generation Process

  - [growthx.ai uses Atlas, an internal AI content generation platform](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Process includes assignment brief, research, outline, draft, fact-checking, and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [Customizable artifacts (company context, target audience, writing guidelines) ensure consistency](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
  - [Manual editing and review at multiple stages for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Social Media Strategy

  - [Customized social posts needed for key team members (Scott, Garvin, James, Chris, Tyler, Cosmo)](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [Need for more authentic tone, especially for Scott's posts](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [Request for additional distribution recommendations (newsletters, podcasts, partnerships)](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)

### Website and Form Requirements

  - [Early access landing page needed for white paper](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [growthx.ai to check on Webflow development support](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [HubSpot form to be created; awaiting best practices on form fields](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)

### Additional Content Projects

  - [Pricing index development postponed until after white paper launch](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Glossary expansion planned with individual pages for key terms](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [Need for web design and development work on glossary pages](https://fathom.video/share/cdPTPEJUYEVJ4MiukknWZ1ZxSxbe_dhk?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
